free_text: -SCATTERING OF 10 MEV NEUTRONS BY LI-6 AND LI-7 -.
PROTON BEAM OF 10.89MEV ON A TRITIUM GAS
TARGET AT 2 ATMOSPHERES PRESSURE, IN A CELL 5.08 CM
LONG WITH A 3.5 MG.CM2 MO WINDOW.
MEAN NEUTRON ENERGY 10 MEV, ENERGY SPREAD 40 KEV.
.CYLINDRICAL SAMPLE WITH AXIS NORMAL TO NEUTRON BEAM
AND 15 CM FROM THE GAS CELL, LI-6 AND LI-7 WERE IN
ALUMINIUM CANS, 4.6 CM DIAMETER, 5.2 CM HIGH
CONTAINING 36.96 G LI-6 ( WITH 4.8 PERCENT LI-7 ATOMS
AND 41.58 G NATURAL LI (WITH 7.42 PERCENT LI-7 ATOMS)
TIME OF FLIGHT. DIAGRAM IN PAPER.
MONITOR DETECTOR WAS A SMALL PLASTIC SCINTILLATOR
MOUNTED 94 CM VERTICALLY ABOVE THE NEUTRON SOURCE.
TAKEN FROM RESULTS OF WILSON, NP,27,421,1961. AND
ENERGIES, 11.94 G OF POLYTHENE AS SAMPLE.
ASSUMED VALUES WERE 269+-29 MB/SR AT 35.9 DEGREES,
AND 171+-24 MB/SR AT 54 DEGREES, 3.46 MEV SECONDARY
UNCERTAINTY IN NORMALISATION. FROM 1.3 TO 4.2 PERCENT
UNCERTAINTY IN UNFOLDING OF SPECTRA. STATISTICAL
ERRORS FROM 0.6 TO 9.5 PERCENT. ESTIMATED 3 PERCENT
UNCERTAINTY FROM NEUTRON SCATTERED FROM SHADOW BARS.
QUOTED ERRORS ARE TOTAL ERRORS AT ONE STANDARD
SOLID ANGLE EFFECTS WITH PROGRAM MAGGIE.
.FITTED WITH LEGENDRE POLYNOMIAL OF FIRST ORDER.
.THE GREATER PART OF THE ERROR IS SYSTEMATICALLY
.CORRECTED FOR MULTIPLE CSCATTERING AND FOR FINITE
.CORRECTED FOR MULTIPLE SCATTERING AND FOR FINITE
.CORRECTED FOR MULTIPLE SCATTERING AND FOR FINITE
TO THE MEASURED NONELASTIC CROSS SECTION.
.CORRECTED FOR MULTIPLE SCATTERING AND FINITE SOLID
.FITTED WITH FIRST ORDER POLYNOMIAL IN COS (THETA).
FOR NEUTRONS FROM ELASTIC SCATTERING AND INELASTIC
INELASTIC SCATTERIENG TO THE 4.63 MEV LEVEL.
